The company will also provide an audio webcast and replay of the call on its website, signaling a routine but closely watched update on performance across its integrated resort portfolio in key gaming markets such as Macau, the Philippines, Cyprus and Sri Lanka.

data.title: Apex Ace Sets 2026 AGM to Approve Results, Board Changes and Share Buyback Mandate
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Apex Ace Holding Ltd. ( (HK:6036) ) just unveiled an update.

Apex Ace Holding Limited has called its annual general meeting for 22 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review and adopt the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and the accompanying directors’ and auditor’s reports. The agenda also includes re‑election of board members, approval of directors’ and auditor’s remuneration, re‑appointment of CCTH CPA Limited as independent auditor, and authorisation for the board to repurchase up to 10% of the company’s issued shares, which may influence capital structure and shareholder returns.

The share repurchase mandate, if approved, would permit the company to buy back its shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange or other recognised exchanges during the period until the next AGM or expiry of the statutory timeframe. This flexibility may allow Apex Ace to manage its equity base more actively, potentially supporting its share price and signalling confidence in its financial position while reinforcing existing governance arrangements through confirmed board and auditor appointments.

More about Apex Ace Holding Ltd.

Apex Ace Holding Limited is a Hong Kong‑listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and operates in the technology sector. The group is overseen by a board comprising executive and independent non‑executive directors, and its shares are traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong.

Average Trading Volume: 450,701

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$510.7M

data.title: Exodus Movement Enforces Secured Rights in UK Receivership
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Exodus Movement, Inc. Class A ( (EXOD) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, Exodus Movement, Inc. announced it had exercised its rights as a secured lender under an English-law term loan facility to appoint receivers in the United Kingdom over Monavate Holdings Limited, Monavate Ltd and Baanx.com Ltd, subsidiaries of W3C Corp that had pledged their shares as collateral for a $70 million loan. The move followed Exodus’s April 13, 2026 declaration that the loans were payable on demand and an unmet April 27, 2026 repayment deadline, with the experienced AlixPartners-led receiver team now taking control of the shares and planning a sale process in which Exodus intends to bid, while the company emphasizes continuity for Monavate and Baanx customers and staff and frames the action as protecting its shareholders.

The receivership action reflects Exodus’s assertive response to W3C’s default and underscores the company’s willingness to enforce its secured creditor rights to safeguard its $70 million exposure. By positioning itself as a bidder in the forthcoming sale of Monavate and Baanx shares, Exodus may influence the future ownership and strategic direction of these UK-based fintech operations, with implications for its own capital recovery and potential expansion of its crypto and payments footprint.

The most recent analyst rating on (EXOD) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exodus Movement, Inc. Class A stock, see the EXOD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EXOD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EXOD is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak cash flow quality and bearish technical momentum, partially offset by a strong, debt-free balance sheet and a mixed-but-constructive strategic narrative from the earnings call. Valuation is not supportive due to losses (negative P/E), and recent corporate events introduce added M&A/legal and dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on EXOD stock, click here.

More about Exodus Movement, Inc. Class A

Exodus Movement, Inc. is a self-custodial cryptocurrency platform that provides software for users to earn rewards, spend, manage, and swap digital assets without relinquishing control of their funds. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Omaha, Nebraska, the company also supplies crypto infrastructure solutions for enterprise platforms serving millions of users worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 86,977

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $244.5M

Learn more about EXOD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Avalo Therapeutics Restructures AlmataBio Milestone Payment Obligations
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Avalo Therapeutics ( (AVTX) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 26, 2026, Avalo Therapeutics entered into a Milestone Buyout Option and Amendment Agreement tied to its March 2024 acquisition of AlmataBio, Inc. The deal restructures a previously agreed $15 million contingent milestone payment that was to be triggered upon dosing the first patient in a Phase 3 trial.

Under the new arrangement, Avalo will pay $2.25 million to former AlmataBio securityholders within five business days of the effective date. It then has a 90-day option to pay an additional $5.125 million in cash, stock, or a mix, to fully settle the milestone, or otherwise remain liable for a $12.75 million payment when the Phase 3 dosing milestone is reached.

The modification, disclosed in an April 28, 2026 press release, gives Avalo greater flexibility in managing near- and medium-term cash outflows linked to its pipeline. The structure may reduce future milestone obligations if the company elects the buyout, potentially improving balance sheet visibility while preserving its strategic focus on advancing IL-1β-based therapies.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVTX) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avalo Therapeutics stock, see the AVTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AVTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVTX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak financial performance (minimal/declining revenue, large losses, and significant cash burn). Technical signals also lean bearish with the stock below key moving averages and a negative MACD. A positive offset comes from a notable pipeline milestone (Phase 2 enrollment complete with Q2 2026 data), but it does not fully counterbalance the current financial and momentum risks.

To see Spark’s full report on AVTX stock, click here.

More about Avalo Therapeutics

Avalo Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing IL-1β-based treatments for immune-mediated inflammatory diseases. Its lead asset, abdakibart (AVTX-009), is in a Phase 2 trial for hidradenitis suppurativa, and the company is exploring additional indications with significant unmet medical need.

Average Trading Volume: 684,299

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $371.9M

Learn more about AVTX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Corning Posts Strong Q1 Results, Extends Springboard Strategy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Corning ( (GLW) ) has provided an update.

On April 28, 2026, Corning reported strong first‑quarter 2026 results, with GAAP sales up 20% year over year to $4.14 billion and core sales up 18% to $4.35 billion, while core EPS climbed 30% to $0.70, reflecting higher margins and robust cash generation. Growth was driven largely by surging demand for generative AI infrastructure and new solar products, with Optical Communications sales up 36% and Solar up 80%, underpinned by additional long‑term hyperscale data‑center contracts similar to its multiyear agreement with Meta.

Management highlighted the continued success of its Springboard plan, noting significant improvements in core operating and gross margins and return on invested capital compared with prior periods. Corning also outlined plans to extend Springboard through 2030 and launch a Photonics Market‑Access Platform targeting Gen AI OEM customers, while guiding for second‑quarter 2026 core sales growth of about 14% and core EPS growth of about 25%, despite a planned extended maintenance shutdown at its U.S. solar wafer facility that will temporarily add $30 million in expenses as it upgrades equipment to boost future throughput.

Corning simultaneously announced a revised segment structure effective in the first quarter of 2026, consolidating its Display and Specialty Materials operations into a Glass Innovations segment and grouping its Hemlock polysilicon, solar wafer, and solar module activities into a new Solar segment. Life Sciences has been folded into a broader Life Sciences and Emerging Growth Businesses category, while Optical Communications and Automotive remain separate, and the company is providing voluntarily recast, unaudited 2024 and 2025 segment figures for investors, emphasizing that these changes do not alter previously reported consolidated GAAP results.

The most recent analyst rating on (GLW) stock is a Buy with a $186.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Corning stock, see the GLW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GLW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GLW is a Neutral.

The score is driven by improving profitability and revenue momentum, supported by strong technical trend signals. Offsetting these positives are weaker cash conversion and a balance sheet with meaningful absolute debt, while valuation is a key headwind due to a high P/E and low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GLW stock, click here.

More about Corning

Corning Incorporated is a diversified technology manufacturer serving the telecommunications, electronics, automotive, semiconductor, and solar industries. Through segments including Optical Communications, Glass Innovations, Automotive, and Solar, it produces optical network components, advanced glass and ceramic materials, vehicle substrates, and silicon-based products such as hyper‑pure polysilicon, wafers, and solar modules for global customers.

Average Trading Volume: 12,219,512

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $151.1B

data.title: Genprex Highlights Promising Preclinical Data for Diabetes Gene Therapy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Genprex ( (GNPX) ) has shared an update.

On April 28, 2026, Genprex announced that research collaborators will present new preclinical data on its diabetes gene therapy candidate GPX-002 at the American Society of Gene and Cell Therapy annual meeting in May 2026. The study in Type 2 diabetic mouse models found that pancreatic delivery of an AAV-encoded Pdx1/MafA construct reversed hyperglycemia, improved glucose-stimulated insulin secretion and shifted beta cells toward a more mature, functional state.

Mice on a high-fat diet that received the CMV- or beta-cell–targeted RIP versions of the therapy showed insulin secretion similar to healthy controls and a restoration of normal glycemic control four weeks after treatment. The findings, including increased mature insulin granules and complete rescue of diet-induced hyperglycemia after direct intrapancreatic infusion, underscore the potential for translating this gene therapy approach to humans via pancreatic delivery techniques, with implications for long-term management of Type 2 diabetes.

More about Genprex

Genprex, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene therapy treatments, including candidates targeting diabetes and oncology. Its pipeline includes a diabetes gene therapy program aimed at improving or restoring pancreatic beta-cell function, with an emphasis on potential long-term glycemic control in Type 2 diabetes patients.

Average Trading Volume: 1,034,912

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $9.39M

For a thorough assessment of GNPX stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: International Care Company narrows 2025 loss and appoints new auditor
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

International Care Company S.p.A ( (IT:ICC) ) has issued an update.

International Care Company S.p.A., a listed Italian assistance services and digital health provider with a 24/7 multilingual control center, reported 2025 revenues of €9.25 million, mostly from institutional clients such as insurers and funds. The group operates four business lines spanning travel and home assistance, health and elderly care, concierge call centers and third-party claims management, with a growing international presence through its stake in Paris-based IAG.

At its ordinary shareholders’ meeting, ICC approved the 2025 financial statements, posting a narrowed net loss of €566,000 on higher revenues, improved EBITDA and a swing to a positive net financial position. The loss will be carried forward, while shareholders appointed RSM Società di Revisione e Organizzazione Contabile S.p.A. as the new statutory auditor for 2026–2028, reinforcing financial oversight as the company works to consolidate its operational recovery.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ICC) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on International Care Company S.p.A stock, see the IT:ICC Stock Forecast page.

More about International Care Company S.p.A

International Care Company S.p.A. is an Italian assistance services provider focused on personal support, digital health assistance and claims management, operating a multilingual 24/7 control center. Founded in 2018 through the contribution of units from FD Service S.p.A. and FD W.OR.L.D. Care S.r.l., it serves mainly institutional clients such as insurers, funds, trade associations, multinationals and public bodies in Italy and abroad.

The group operates across four business lines covering travel, home and vehicle assistance, digital health and elderly care, concierge and call center services, and claims handling on behalf of third parties. ICC is one of the leading domestic players in personal assistance with a growing international footprint via its 9.53% stake in Paris-based IAG, generating 2025 revenues of €9.25 million, mostly in Italy but with significant exposure to Europe and the rest of the world.

Average Trading Volume: 4,328

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €6.39M

Nova Minerals Limited Sponsored ADR ( (NVA) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, Nova Minerals Limited confirmed it had dispatched a Scheme Booklet and Notice of Scheme Meeting to shareholders, ADS holders and listed warrantholders as part of its proposed redomiciliation from Australia to the United States via interlocking schemes of arrangement. The booklet, registered with ASIC and available online, outlines independent expert support for the share and warrant schemes, director recommendations to vote in favour, details of in-person and virtual scheme meetings scheduled in Sydney on May 29, 2026, and the planned exchange ratios under which investors would receive shares, CDIs or warrants in a new Nevada-incorporated U.S. holding company to be listed on ASX and the NYSE.

Nova Minerals Limited is a mineral exploration and development company with main operations in Alaska’s Matanuska-Susitna Borough and corporate headquarters in Victoria, Australia. The company is listed on ASX and Nasdaq, with its securities also traded OTC and in Frankfurt, and is transitioning its corporate domicile from Australia to the United States to align with its U.S.-focused asset base and investor markets.
